resultList.dtldesc: Make your dream home in the heart of Madhavaram, Chennai with this stunning 3 BHK apartment for sale in the upscale Casagrand Builder Northern Star. Situated on the 12th level of a modern building, this property offers a perfect blend of comfort, elegance, and accessibility, which is perfect for families seeking an elite lifestyle.Property SpecificationsThis large 3 BHK apartment is semi-furnished, with necessary wardrobes in all three bedrooms for maximum storage. The whole apartment is designed with classy vitrified tiles, ensuring a classy and contemporary appearance all over. The design features three well-proportioned bedrooms, the master bedroom and Bedroom 1 having attached bathrooms, and a third common bathroom for visitors. All of the bathrooms are designed in a modern Western style.One of the attractions of this apartment is the balcony, which is connected to the living room and gives a nice view of the side road, and there is fresh air and sunshine available. The semi-modular kitchen has cabinets and a tall unit, which gives great functionality to cook and prepare meals. Since it is designed to be North facing, there are no Vaastu problems, and it ensures a peaceful living space.FacilitiesCasagrand Builder Northern Star residents have an abundance of amenities to live in style. The complex comprises over 30 amenities, such as a clubhouse, party hall, swimming pool, gym, golf simulator, mini theater, and an open theater. Sports enthusiasts can indulge in tennis courts, basketball courts, and a terrace cricket area.Kids will enjoy the play area, while grown-ups can relax in the fountain rest area or do yoga in the specific yoga garden. The flat also features 1 covered car parking space, providing easy access to your car. To ensure your safety and well-being, the property has CCTV surveillance and a 247 security staff, guaranteeing a secure living environment.LocalityLocated at a prime area of Madhavaram, this apartment boasts all the required facilities within its reach. Schools such as St. Annes College, St. Annes Primary School, and GreenField Chennai International School nearby increase the value of the area. Medical facilities are within walking distance of Meridian Hospital and KVT Multi-Speciality Hospital. It is convenient to shop with the upcoming NDR Mall, D Mart, and local markets nearby.Transport is easily accessible, with the bus stop just opposite the gate and the Madhavaram Bus Terminus being only 5 minutes away. The proposed Madhavaram Metro Station will provide additional connectivity, and Perambur Railway Station is 4 km away, providing easy connectivity to the remainder of the city.
